title: Consistency of colours in charts
excerpt: If I have two graphs side by side in a dashboard, for a  month on month comparison, displaying the same information, it would be nice if the data expressed in the first graph, remained the same colour in the second graph…

posts.author: Tracy (Tracy Emma Pontin)
posts.cookedHtml: If I have two graphs side by side in a dashboard, for a month on month comparison, displaying the same information, it would be nice if the data expressed in the first graph, remained the same colour in the second graph. Is there no way of assigning a colour to data so it remains consistent throughout? Surely that would be a useful tool so you can see at a glance how things have changed from one to the other?
